metadata.gitb:name: Kenya Patient Summary (KPS) Interoperability Conformance Suite
metadata.gitb:description: A comprehensive validation suite designed to assess structural integrity, semantic correctness, and interoperability compliance of Kenya Patient Summary (KPS) FHIR payloads. The suite forwards submitted resources to a reference HAPI FHIR server for rigorous standards-based validation against national implementation requirements.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: Client System
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: An external clinical or health information system that generates and submits KPS-compliant FHIR resources for validation as part of interoperability testing.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: Reference Validation Engine (HAPI FHIR Server)
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: A standards-compliant FHIR validation service responsible for evaluating submitted payloads against FHIR specifications, terminology bindings, and Kenya-specific implementation constraints.
